center.name: 巴韋安島
center.summary: 巴韋安島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Cave swiftlet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The cave swiftlet is native to Malaysia and Indonesia. It is found in the Sundaic region, in Java, Madura Island, Bawean, Kangean Island, Nusa Penida, Bali and Lombok, parts of Sumatra, and the western slopes of Mount Kinabalu on Sabah, Borneo

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The cave swiftlet is native to Malaysia and Indonesia. It is found in the Sundaic region, in Java, Madura Island, Bawean, Kangean Island, Nusa Penida, Bali and Lombok, parts of Sumatra, and the western slopes of Mount Kinabalu on Sabah, Borneo
